name: Hunan Copote Science Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hunan Copote Science Technology Co.,Ltd. provides integrated IT services in the postal industry. The company offers China post vehicle operation control platform, a philatelic platform; China post Internet SMS service platform; satellite positioning intelligent vehicle; smart parcel cabinets; smart mailboxes; financial security intelligent management systems; money transport vehicle monitoring systems; smart travel systems; intelligent mail logistics systems; and bubble counting machines. It also provides Bluetooth electronic scales; network advertising media publishing systems; portable ticket label printers; desktop thermal barcode label printers; electronic surface sheet printers; industrial barcode label printers; document ticket scanners; handheld smart terminals; postage machines; and envelope printers. The company is headquartered in Changsha, China.
